definitions.add:
npgsql sqlite FirebirdSQL
SELECT DISTINCT vp.ent_id, n.name_given, n.name_family, ad.addr_country, ad.addr_county, ad.addr_state, ad.addr_city, ad.addr_street, dob, gender, reg_date AS reg_date, marital_sts, living_arr, bp_name.name AS birthplace, COALESCE(reg_name.name, 'Other') AS registration, asn_name.name AS assigned FROM vw_pat_tbl vp LEFT JOIN ent_addr_tbl AS ad ON (ad.ent_id = vp.ent_id AND ad.addr_type = 'HomeAddress') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl AS n ON (n.ent_id = vp.ent_id AND n.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl bp_name ON (bp_name.ent_id = birthplace AND bp_name.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl reg_name ON (reg_name.ent_id = registration_facility AND reg_name.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl asn_name ON (asn_name.ent_id = assigned_facility AND asn_name.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') WHERE (${registration_facility}::UUID IS NULL OR registration_facility = ${registration_facility}::UUID) AND (${assigned_facility}::UUID IS NULL OR assigned_facility = ${assigned_facility}::UUID) AND created_time BETWEEN ${reg_from} AND ${reg_to}
